$comment: Single documented source for the feature-first architecture rules. ESLint EXECUTES the enforceable subset (see eslint/architecture.mjs); this catalog maps each rule to its ADR, its enforcement mechanism, and its status. The architecture-oversight agent reads this file to know which rules are deterministically gated vs. which still require judgment. Update here AND in eslint/architecture.mjs together.

layers.client: features/*/api-client.ts — one method per endpoint, no composition
layers.builder: features/*/builders/** — pure payload builders, no HTTP
layers.page: features/*/pages/** — POM: locators + actions, never a client

rules.title: Forbidden cross-layer imports (Page→client, client→client, builder→HTTP, leaf modules dependency-free)
rules.judgment_residue: Whether composition was placed in the RIGHT home (seeding.ts vs fixture) — agent.

rules.title: expect lives in tests/, never in Page Objects
No raw Playwright locators in specs — locators live in Page Objects
rules.enforced_by: eslint:no-restricted-syntax (specs scope) — bans page.getBy*/locator/frameLocator; expect(page)/page.goto allowed
rules.notes: Mirror of ASSERT-003. Static locator -> POM getter; dynamic/parameterised -> POM method returning Locator (e.g. errorToast(msg), emailText(email)); cross-cutting -> core/ui/BasePage. Keeps a Playwright API change to one place per locator, not every test.

rules.title: No interface declared inside a spec; shared types live in types.ts
Stable locators — no nth-child / XPath / raw CSS chains
rules.judgment_residue: Whether a getByRole/getByLabel choice is semantically the right anchor — agent.

rules.title: Cross-cutting boilerplate (logging, error handling) is extracted to core/, not copy-pasted per file
rules.notes: Replaces the old 'logVerbose at every method entry' convention, which was itself a copy-paste anti-pattern. Linter flags duplication; extraction into core/ is a one-time human/agent action.

rules.title: A blank line separates the action block from the assertion block inside a test (Act/Assert readability)
rules.notes: Keys off expect() so it works on Playwright specs. Lives in the full `lint` (not lint:arch); auto-applied by `npm run lint:fix`. Make actions vs checks scannable at a glance.

rules.title: Pages & builders are private to their feature; cross-feature uses only public entry points
Specs take the fixture-provided test/expect, never raw @playwright/test; cross-module = mergeTests
rules.judgment_residue: Whether a 2+-feature spec actually composed via mergeTests (vs. ad-hoc) — agent.

rules.title: No Flow/Facade layer — no flows|facades dirs, no *Flow.ts / *Facade.ts files
Every feature with tests/ has a scenario doc at docs/test-migration/scenarios/<feature>.md
Independent tests — no ordering dependency, no shared mutable state
rules.notes: Partially heuristic; left to the oversight agent.

rules.title: Fixtures preferred over beforeAll unless genuinely once-per-file
Test verifies the documented user intent and is not always-green
